title: Al's Mobs for Big Globe
description: A pack that makes AL's Enderman/Piglin/Skeleton compatible with the Big Globe mod.
body:
A pack that makes AL's Enderman/Piglin/Skeleton compatible with the Big Globe mod.A pack that makes AL's Enderman/Piglin/Skeleton compatible with the Big Globe mod. You must have at least one of those three resource packs installed (including optifine or EMF + ETF) as well as Big Globe for this pack to work as intended.

In essence, it adds Big Globes biomes to the lists for the textures that spawn by biome, as well as changing some height based spawning to work with the new world height.

Make sure that this resource pack is loaded above all of AL's for proper functionality.
